activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct linker for a yes/no question.
activities.prompt: She asked that the shop was open.

evaluator.answer: She asked if the shop was open

activities.explanation: Una pregunta sí/no usa «if» o «whether», no «that».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with affirmative word order.
activities.prompt: He asked where was the station.

evaluator.answer: He asked where the station was

activities.explanation: La pregunta reportada usa «where the station was».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete instruction, adding “us” as the required listener.
activities.prompt: The guard told to wait outside.

evaluator.answer: The guard told us to wait outside

activities.explanation: «Tell» necesita la persona que recibe la instrucción.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete request with the correct infinitive structure.
activities.prompt: Maya asked Leo that help her.

evaluator.answer: Maya asked Leo to help her

activities.explanation: Una petición usa «asked + persona + to + infinitivo».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete negative instruction with “not to”.
activities.prompt: The technician told me don't touch the switch.

evaluator.answer: The technician told me not to touch the switch

activities.explanation: La orden negativa usa «not to touch».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence without “did” and with affirmative order.
activities.prompt: The cashier asked me if did I need a receipt.

evaluator.answer: The cashier asked me if I needed a receipt

activities.explanation: Tras «if» usamos «I needed» sin auxiliar.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete wh-question with affirmative order.
activities.prompt: Nina asked why was the gate locked.

evaluator.answer: Nina asked why the gate was locked

activities.explanation: El sujeto precede a «was».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete instruction with the correct reporting verb pattern.
activities.prompt: The assistant said me to keep the receipt.

evaluator.answer: The assistant told me to keep the receipt

activities.explanation: Una instrucción dirigida usa «told me to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete request without “to” before the listener.
activities.prompt: I asked to the guide to speak more slowly.

evaluator.answer: I asked the guide to speak more slowly

activities.explanation: La persona sigue directamente a «asked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete ability question with “asked if”.
activities.prompt: She asked me to could swim.

evaluator.answer: She asked me if I could swim

activities.explanation: La frase pregunta por capacidad; no solicita que la persona nade.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete past reported question without “did”.
activities.prompt: They asked when did the meeting start.

evaluator.answer: They asked when the meeting had started

activities.explanation: Se elimina «did» y el verbo retrocede a past perfect.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question with correct order and participle.
activities.prompt: Jo asked whether had the parcel arrive.

evaluator.answer: Jo asked whether the parcel had arrived

activities.explanation: El orden es «the parcel had arrived».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete negative instruction with the infinitive pattern.
activities.prompt: The marshal told the drivers don't block the entrance.

evaluator.answer: The marshal told the drivers not to block the entrance

activities.explanation: La forma es «told the drivers not to block».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete negative request with “not to” and correct possessive.
activities.prompt: Maya asked me to not mentioned my address.

evaluator.answer: Maya asked me not to mention her address

activities.explanation: Usamos «not to mention» y «her» para Maya.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete polite request as an action request.
activities.prompt: Sara asked Leo if to open the window.

evaluator.answer: Sara asked Leo to open the window

activities.explanation: La petición usa «asked Leo to», sin «if».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete later report, correcting order and all references.
activities.prompt: Nina asked Omar whether would he be here tomorrow.

evaluator.answer: Nina asked Omar whether he would be there the next day

activities.explanation: Se corrigen orden, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete reported question without “did” and with changed references.
activities.prompt: Amir asked Lena where did she put these keys.

evaluator.answer: Amir asked Lena where she had put those keys

activities.explanation: Se elimina «did» y cambian tiempo y demostrativo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete subject question without “did”.
activities.prompt: Eva asked who did call her.

evaluator.answer: Eva asked who had called her

activities.explanation: «Who» ya es sujeto; la acción anterior usa «had called».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence so it asks about availability rather than requesting the action.
activities.prompt: The manager asked me to could help.

evaluator.answer: The manager asked me if I could help

activities.explanation: La consulta de disponibilidad usa «asked me if».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence so it requests the action rather than asking about ability.
activities.prompt: The manager asked me if to help with the event.

evaluator.answer: The manager asked me to help with the event

activities.explanation: La petición de acción usa «asked me to help».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete later report, correcting the request and every reference.
activities.prompt: Rina asked Leo if bring these folders here tomorrow.

evaluator.answer: Rina asked Leo to bring those folders there the next day

activities.explanation: La petición usa «to» y cambian demostrativo, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete reported question with correct order, tense and pronouns.
activities.prompt: Nora asked Sam why hadn't he send me the revised figures.

evaluator.answer: Nora asked Sam why he hadn't sent her the revised figures

activities.explanation: Se corrigen orden, participio y pronombre.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete pair of instructions with one reporting structure.
activities.prompt: The guide told to us stay together and don't cross the rope.

evaluator.answer: The guide told us to stay together and not to cross the rope

activities.explanation: Usamos «told us to» y coordinamos la negativa con «not to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete formal question with correct “whether or not” order.
activities.prompt: The customer asked whether was or not the fee refundable.

evaluator.answer: The customer asked whether or not the fee was refundable

activities.explanation: «Whether or not» va seguido de orden afirmativo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report, distinguishing the ability question from the action request.
activities.prompt: Ana asked me to drive, then asked if I could drive her home.

evaluator.answer: Ana asked me if I could drive, then asked me to drive her home

activities.explanation: La primera frase pregunta capacidad; la segunda solicita la acción.
